text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: With the Arima Kinen closing in, Agnes Tachyon comes to the realization that the something she's been lacking is a rival.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That same day, she goes running with Manhattan
Cafe, and the flames of rivalry begin to kindle
within her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After much thought, Agnes Tachyon comes to see
her as someone special—as her rival.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Later in an interview, Agnes Tachyon expresses
her excitement to face off against her rival in the
Arima Kinen.
